title: Čačak, Moravica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Čačak, Moravica: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Čačak is a city in Moravica with a population of 73,000. A city in central Serbia at the foot of Mount Jelica, known for its thermal springs, medieval monasteries, and the Ovčar-Kablar Gorge.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
